---
title: "Syllabus"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
  typst:
    margin:
      x: 1in
      y: 1in
---


::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
[Download PDF](syllabus.pdf){.btn .btn-primary download="syllabus.pdf" role="button"}
:::

## Course Description

[Describe the course here: scope, themes, the substantive questions it addresses, and how it fits into the broader program of study.]

## Learning Objectives

By the end of this course, students will be able to:

- [Learning objective 1]
- [Learning objective 2]
- [Learning objective 3]

## Required Materials

- [Required textbook(s)]
- [Required software / tools]
- [Other materials]

## Grading

| Component | Weight |
|---|---|
| [Assignment 1] | [%] |
| [Assignment 2] | [%] |
| [Final project] | [%] |
| [Participation] | [%] |

## Course Policies

### Attendance

[Attendance policy.]

### Late work

[Late work policy.]

### Academic integrity

[Academic integrity statement.]

### Accommodations

[Accessibility / accommodations statement.]

## Class Schedule

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
source("R/schedule.R")
knitr::kable(class_schedule_df)
```
